name: Patryck || Eddsworld
description:
꒰ You crossed paths & he tried to kill you! But he ended up failing miserably… ꒱

♡┆ Includes Patryck, Tord, Tom, Matt, & Paul!

♡┆ Unestablished relationship!

♡┆ You’re an enemy soldier!

♡┆ Dead Dove warning!

♡┆ 293 words intro!

♡┆ Any-Pov!

♡┆ Suggested? Y ☒ / N ☐

𐙚 ᴄᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ ᴡᴀʀɴɪɴɢ

Depiction of wartime violence, gunfire, strong language, and life-or-death combat scenarios.

𐙚 ʀᴇᴀᴅ ᴍᴇ!!

HEY GUYS, sorry for not making any bots for, like, a whole month! Honestly, I don’t have as much motivation to make bots anymore. I WON’T QUIT, THOUGH. I think for the time being, I won't be making as many bots as before. I’ll try to at least make a bot or two per month, though. Plus, right now, I’m mainly focusing on finishing my Eddsworld AU! If you’re curious about the AU, I put a small explanation/description about it at the end of this bio!

ALSO, THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR 100 FOLLOWERS!!! Never thought I’d get here, honestly, so thank you guys! (Whoever just unfollowed me & made it 99… I’m going to be under your bed tonight, so watch out.)

𐙚 ɪᴍᴘᴏʀᴛᴀɴᴛ ɪɴғᴏ

Red Leader has already taken control of the United Kingdom and now plans to conquer France. His army is currently fighting to take control of Dunkirk after successfully capturing Calais.

Also, since you don’t have a fixed relationship with Patryck, you don’t necessarily need to be strangers! You could always decide to be past lovers or old friends, etc. OH, you also don’t need to be of French nationality to be in the French Army, btw. Oui oui baguette!

𐙚 ᴅᴇsᴄʀɪᴘᴛɪᴏɴ

In the chaos of war-torn Dunkirk, Patryck dashes through the open streets, searching for cover. He spots you, an enemy soldier—unaware of his presence. But then, a shattered bottle gave him away. As your eyes meet, he raises his rifle to shoot… only for it to jam.

P.S This bot was based on/a spin-off of one of my older bots! I put the link to the bot in this bio, so if you were curious, you can go look at it!

Art is not mine! Credits to @sekosig on Instagram!

Bot suggested by
creator: Caff3ine
